title: Officers of board, election; service of process
doc_html:
§951.17.  Officers of board, election; service of process

The board of trustees shall at the regular meeting in February of each year elect from its members a president and a vice-president for a term of one year.  Legal process shall be served on the president or in his absence or inability to act on the vice-president.

Redesignated from R.S. 17:1037 pursuant to R.S. 24:253.
doc_text:
§951.17.  Officers of board, election; service of process
The board of trustees shall at the regular meeting in February of each year elect from its members a president and a vice-president for a term of one year.  Legal process shall be served on the president or in his absence or inability to act on the vice-president.
Redesignated from R.S. 17:1037 pursuant to R.S. 24:253.
